name: Tofu Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Tahini or peanut butter OR sunflower seed butter
1 pinch Sugar or a little Honey
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a food processor.
2. Blend until the mixture is very smooth and well combined.
3. Serve with fresh vegetables, crackers, or use as a sandwich filling.
4. Makes about 2 cups.
